import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if has
          if neg
            result = list.push(result, -cur)
          else
            result = list.push(result, cur)
          end
          cur = 0
          has = false
          neg = false
        end
      else if b == 45
        neg = true
      else if b == 43
        has = true
      else
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, -cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let len = remaining.len()
    mut max_i = 0
    mut max_v = 0
    match remaining.get(0)
    when Some(v)
      max_v = v
    when None
      ()
    end
    mut j = 1
    while j < len
      match remaining.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if v > max_v
          max_v = v
          max_i = j
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    result = list.push(result, max_v)
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut k = 0
    while k < len
      if k != max_i
        match remaining.get(k)
        when Some(v)
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut line1 = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line1 = s
  when None
    ()
  end
  mut line2 = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line2 = s
  when None
    ()
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  mut k = 0
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    k = n
  when None
    ()
  end
  let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
  let total = sorted.len()
  let take = if k < total
    k
  else
    total
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < take
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
